name: hybrid-loops
description: Hybrid loops: a design pattern where LLM judgment and deterministic code alternate in a cycle that's mutually generative — each half produces the working surface the other operates over. Stacks at runtime AND during development. The plugin ships the diagnostic-first skill and the library of named graph-shapes; reference MCP servers (cal_log, metacog, schemaforge) live in the repo as forkable starter kits but aren't bundled into the install.
